~ Chebrolu Bhavya Sri
: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd6K14IQDXCYH-vXhq9tRG13l7ea-zoa1fvHxeE_br6vZr7DQ/viewform?usp=header Dear Students, The CS&IT Department, KL University is organizing a one-week NSS Camp from 23rd March to 29th March. We invite all interested CS&IT students to actively participate in this meaningful community service initiative. Important Information: Attendance will be provided only to CS&IT students, including CRT students. Lunch will be provided during the camp. Students will be eligible for attendance only if they attend all six days of the camp. Once registered, participants are expected to attend the camp for the entire six-day duration without fail. We encourage enthusiastic participation and commitment from all volunteers. Regards, NSS, CS&IT Department KL University

CRACKON Presents – DARK CTF | National Level Capture The Flag Think you can break the system? Prove it. DARK CTF is a national-level cybersecurity competition engineered to test real-world skills — not theory, only execution. Hosted by the CrackOn Community, this event challenges participants to think, exploit, analyze, and defend under pressure. Compete Across: Web Security Cryptography Digital Forensics Reverse Engineering OSINT & more Register Now: https://hackculture.io/hackathons/dark-ctf website link : https://crack-on.live Competition Format: • Online Qualifier – Jeopardy-style CTF + Boot2Root Machines • Top teams advance based on performance and quality of write-ups Prize Pool Worth ₹8 Lakhs Premium Certifications • Professional Licenses • Learning Coupons Team Size: 1–3 Members Registration: FREE (Open to all) Organized by CrackOn Community If you’re serious about cybersecurity, this is your arena.

2/10/2026
RAGILE RAGILE Feel the rise of passion, dreams, and unbreakable hope with #RagileRagile, an inspiring musical journey from our upcoming short film—celebrating the heart of a true filmmaker. This soulful track captures the story of a young dreamer who lives and breathes cinema. Despite facing countless rejections, closed doors, and moments of loneliness—where even his closest friends drift away—his spirit never bends. Ragile Ragile beautifully portrays the emotional storm within him, the pain of being misunderstood, and the unshakeable belief that keeps him moving forward. And just when everything seems dark, friendship finds its way back. Together, they rise, pick up the camera again, and complete the film that once felt impossible. Presented by KL SAC Movie Makers, Ragile Ragile is a song of persistence, brotherhood, and the unstoppable fire of creativity—a reminder that no dream is too big and no struggle is too heavy when the heart refuses to give up. A KL SAC Movie Makers Presentation Writer & Director – Kiran Chowdary DOP – Yuvaraj Editor – Harsha Assistant Director – Saketh Starring – Rajesh Cast – Umesh, Bhavesh, Bhuvanesh Song – Ragile Ragile Film Releasing on February 10th If this song touched your heart, don’t forget to: Like | Comment | Share | Subscribe Let’s support indie cinema and celebrate the emotion of Ragile Ragile!
